layout.notes: Clean, editable scene optimized for text clarity.

elements.content: Think of it like exploring a maze – you pick a path and keep going until you hit a dead end, then you backtrack.
DFS uses a ‘stack’ – imagine a pile of plates.
We add nodes to this stack as we visit them.
Explore neighbors, add to stack; backtrack when a dead end is reached.

```mermaid
  graph TD
      A[Start Node] --> B(Neighbor 1)
      A --> C(Neighbor 2)
      B --> D(Neighbor of B)
      C --> E(Neighbor of C)
      D -- Dead End -- F
      E -- Dead End -- G
    ```
